NewsItem.title: News Item
NewsItem.description: An autonomously found and neutralized news article.

title.description: The neutral headline of the news

sourceQuery.description: The query used by AI to find this

authorId.description: UID of the user who triggered the search

ChatContext.title: Chat Context
ChatContext.description: A conversation between a user and the AI about a specific news item.

/news/{newsId}.description: Global database of neutralized news. Anyone authenticated can read and create, but only owners can update/delete.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}.description: Private chat records for a user asking questions about news.
